task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM interface shows Elena Rossi (EMP-2050) selected in the employee list or document management screen.

task_completion.description: Enter Document Name and Document Number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Name field contains 'Passport' and the Document Number field contains 'YT8822119'.

task_completion.description: Enter Issue Date and Expiry Date
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Issue Date field is set to 15-Jan-2023 and the Expiry Date field is set to 14-Jan-2030.

task_completion.description: Enable and configure the expiry alert for 60 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: The alert/warning checkbox is checked and the alert period is set to 60 days before expiry.

task_completion.description: Attach the specified passport sample file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path 'C:\workspace\data\passport_sample.pdf' is entered in the attachment field or visible in a file selection dialog.
The document record is saved and appears in the list of documents for Elena Rossi.

integrity.description: Agent used the AttendHRM GUI to add the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AttendHRM graphical user interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual AttendHRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is AttendHRM, not a text editor, mock application, or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing Firebird SQL commands (e.g., using SYSDBA/masterkey credentials) are used to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected alert is exactly 60 days before expiry. The database credentials are SYSDBA / masterkey. Note: The sample file passport_sample.pdf may be missing from the environment; the agent should at least attempt to attach it or create a dummy file in its place.
